metadata.name: Commander dies — auto-redirected to command zone (CR 903.9)
metadata.description: p1's commander (Llanowar Elves, 1/1) is on the battlefield. p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting the commander, dealing 3 damage. SBA triggers: commander has lethal damage and would go to graveyard. The commander zone-change replacement (pre-registered by the builder at game start) auto-applies (single applicable replacement), redirecting the commander to p1's command zone. Asserts the commander is NOT in p1's graveyard and NOT on the battlefield.
metadata.generation_notes: The commander zone-change replacement is pre-registered by register_commander_zone_replacements in the builder (not through ETB). Only one replacement applies (commander->graveyard), so it auto-applies per CR 616.1. No OrderReplacements needed. The assert checks negative evidence (not in graveyard, not on battlefield) since the harness does not have a zones.command_zone assertion path.

script.step_note: p2 casts Lightning Bolt to kill p1's commander; commander zone-change replacement auto-applies

actions.description: Initial: Llanowar Elves (commander) on p1's battlefield
actions.note: Commander is on the battlefield. Commander zone-change replacement is pre-registered by the builder.
CR 601.2: p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting p1's commander (Llanowar Elves, 1/1).
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Lightning Bolt resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to Llanowar Elves (1/1 commander). 3 ≥ 1 toughness — lethal.

actions.note: Lightning Bolt resolves; commander takes lethal damage.

results.description: Llanowar Elves (commander) has marked damage 3 ≥ toughness 1 — would die. Commander zone-change replacement (pre-registered at game start) auto-applies (single applicable effect). Commander redirected to p1's command zone instead of graveyard.

actions.note: CR 903.9 + 616.1: Single replacement auto-applied; commander goes to command zone.

actions.description: After SBA: commander NOT in graveyard and NOT on battlefield (went to command zone)
actions.note: CR 903.9: Commander replacement fired; Elves in command zone (not graveyard). Harness has no zones.command_zone assertion, verified by negative evidence.
